lines.speaker: Mori
lines.text: Hello there. Thank you for helping us, you are a good friend to the people of Arceuus.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's not a problem. What brings you here?

lines.speaker: Mori
lines.text: I come here quite often now. This is a nice quiet place for me to think and reflect. It's my way of remembering Thana.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll leave you in peace then.

lines.speaker: Mori
lines.text: Hello there. Did you manage to get that device hidden?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yes. Got it all done with no problems at all.

lines.speaker: Mori
lines.text: Good. Hopefully Kourend will have no more issues with the Disciples of Yama.
